## 🛠️ Type of Change
<!-- Please check the options that apply. -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX Enhancement (visual improvements, styling, layouts)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update (README, CONTRIBUTING, inline docs)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance optimization / Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] 🧪 Tests (adding or updating test coverage)

## ✅ Contribution Checklist
<!-- Go over all the following points, and check them if they apply to your PR. -->
- [ ] I have linked an approved and assigned Issue above.
- [ ] My code follows the coding standards and styling guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally and verified they work as expected.
- [ ] There are no JavaScript errors or warnings in the browser developer console.
- [ ] I have verified that the UI is responsive across different device sizes (if modifying frontend).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README, code comments, docstrings) accordingly, if necessary.
- [ ] I have not committed any sensitive information (e.g. API keys, secrets, local config files).
- [ ] I have reviewed, understood, and tested all code submitted in this PR (no blind AI generated code).
